[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010101001 5
1 1110011100 6
2 0010000101 3
3 0111110000 5
4 0101110000 4
5 0111011000 5
6 1110011111 8
7 0101101111 7
